tasks.title: Redis/Memcached Caching Plugin
tasks.description: Implement caching layer for faster page loads. Cache rendered pages, API responses, and database queries with TTL support and cache invalidation on content updates.

tasks.title: Redirects Manager Plugin
tasks.description: 301/302 redirect manager with wildcard patterns, bulk import/export, and redirect loop detection. Track redirect performance and analytics.

tasks.title: Forms Plugin
tasks.description: Drag-and-drop form builder with text, email, textarea, select, checkbox, radio field types. Form submissions stored in database with email notifications. Anti-spam protection.

tasks.title: Full-Text Search Plugin
tasks.description: Lunr.js integration for client-side search or Elasticsearch for server-side. Index all content, provide search API endpoint, search result highlighting, and faceted search.

tasks.title: Tags & Categories Plugin
tasks.description: Taxonomy system for organizing content. Create tag/category clouds, filter content by taxonomy, and auto-generate taxonomy archive pages.

tasks.title: Content Relationships Plugin
tasks.description: Link pages to each other with relationship types (related, parent-child, references). Display related content on pages and build content graphs.

tasks.title: Custom Fields Plugin
tasks.description: Extend pages with custom field types: text, textarea, number, date, select, checkbox, repeater. Field groups with conditional logic.

tasks.title: Content Blocks Plugin
tasks.description: Reusable content snippets (like WordPress reusable blocks). Create once, use anywhere. Sync across pages when block is updated.

tasks.title: Image Optimization Plugin
tasks.description: Automatic WebP conversion, responsive image generation, lazy loading, CDN integration. Image compression and optimization pipeline.

tasks.title: Navigation Builder Plugin
tasks.description: Drag-and-drop menu builder for site navigation. Multiple menus, nested items, visibility conditions. Auto-generate from page hierarchy.

tasks.title: Comments System Plugin
tasks.description: Comment system with threaded replies, moderation queue, spam filtering (Akismet integration), email notifications, and admin dashboard.

tasks.title: Automated Backups Plugin
tasks.description: Scheduled automated backups with multiple storage backends (local, S3, Dropbox). Incremental backups, one-click restore, backup encryption.

tasks.title: Maintenance Mode Plugin
tasks.description: Site maintenance page with countdown timer, whitelist IPs, scheduled maintenance windows, and custom maintenance messages.

tasks.title: Multi-language (i18n) Plugin
tasks.description: Translation management for multiple languages. Language switcher, translation editor, RTL support, and language-specific content routing.

tasks.title: Webhooks Plugin
tasks.description: Trigger HTTP webhooks on content events (create, update, delete, publish). Custom payload templates, retry logic, webhook logs, and signature verification.

tasks.title: Email/SMTP Plugin
tasks.description: Email delivery for notifications, password resets, form submissions. SMTP configuration, email templates, queue management.

tasks.title: Import/Export Plugin
tasks.description: Import from WordPress (WXR), JSON, CSV. Full site export with all content and media. Scheduled imports with mapping configuration.

tasks.title: Social Sharing Plugin
tasks.description: Auto-generate OpenGraph/Twitter Card images, share buttons, social analytics. Integration with Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn APIs.

tasks.title: GDPR/CCPA Compliance Plugin
tasks.description: Cookie consent banner, data export (portability), right to be forgotten (data deletion), privacy policy generator, consent logs.

tasks.title: Two-Factor Authentication Plugin
tasks.description: TOTP/Email 2FA for admin accounts. QR code generation, backup codes, enforced 2FA for specific roles.

tasks.title: Implement Plugin Marketplace
tasks.description: Plugin marketplace with ZIP upload, browse/install, auto-updates

tasks.title: Create JSON Storage plugin
tasks.description: Create JSON storage plugin as default backend - read/write JSON files in content/ directory

tasks.title: Implement Plugin Marketplace
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Plugin Marketplace. Easy plugin discovery and installation. ZIP upload, marketplace browse, auto-updates for plugins.

tasks.title: Create plugin.json schema
tasks.description: Define plugin.json schema, create base Plugin class all plugins extend from

tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Initialize project structure with directories, autoloading, entry point, and basic config system

tasks.title: Build GraphQL plugin
tasks.description: GraphQL API plugin with query/mutation support for content

tasks.title: Implement SQLite storage plugin
tasks.description: Create StorageInterface abstraction, implement SQLite storage plugin

tasks.title: Implement Core Foundation
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Core Foundation. The essential building blocks of the project.

tasks.title: Build Admin UI plugin
tasks.description: Admin UI plugin with Vue/React SPA - manage content, plugins, settings

tasks.title: Implement Storage Abstraction
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Storage Abstraction. Pluggable storage backends with unified interface. Default JSON files (Bludit-style), with plugins for SQLite, MySQL, PostgreSQL support.

tasks.title: Implement Event Dispatcher
tasks.description: Event Dispatcher using mediator pattern - dispatch/listen to events (cms.page.render, api.content.get, etc.)

tasks.title: Implement Core Plugin System
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Core Plugin System. Full WordPress-like plugin architecture with hooks, events, lifecycle (install/activate/deactivate/uninstall), routing, and dependency resolution. Core of the CMS extensibility.

tasks.title: Build REST API plugin
tasks.description: REST API plugin with endpoints: /api/pages, /api/content/{key}, /api/users

tasks.title: Implement Plugin Manager
tasks.description: Plugin Manager with discovery (scan /plugins), lifecycle (install/activate/deactivate/uninstall), dependency resolution

tasks.title: Write unit tests
tasks.description: Write unit tests for core plugin system, storage, and API

tasks.title: Implement Admin UI Plugin
tasks.description: Implement the feature: Admin UI Plugin. Optional admin panel plugin for non-engineers to manage content, plugins, and settings. Easy deployment via admin UI.

tasks.title: Implement API-First Headless
tasks.description: Implement the feature: API-First Headless. REST API for headless content access. Default API endpoints for pages, content, users. Plugins can extend with custom endpoints.
